title: Blues in the Night
writer: Edwin Gilbert, Robert Rossen, Elia Kazan
actors: Priscilla Lane, Betty Field, Richard Whorf
plot: "Jigger' Pine forms a band that includes singer Ginger 'Character' Powell, wife of the trumpeter Leo Powell, and Nickie Haroyen and Peppi. All of them dedicate themselves to work as a unit and to play blues music. The dedication i...
